description: A family-run farm in the heart of Roscommon, producing organic vegetables and free-range meat for three generations. We believe in farming in harmony with nature.
Nestled in the rolling hills of Cavan, O'Callaghan Farm has produced free-range eggs and farmhouse dairy for over 30 years. Our hens roam freely on lush pasture year-round.
Martin's crafts rustic sourdoughs and wholemeal loaves using stone-ground organic Irish rye and wheat. Every loaf is hand-shaped and slow-fermented for 24 hours.
Set in the wild beauty of West Cork, Caheragh Organic Farm produces award-winning heather and blackberry honey. Our bees forage across unspoiled meadows and coastal hedgerows.
Our Atlantic coast creamery sources milk exclusively from grass-fed cows grazing on the Connemara landscape. We hand-churn butter, age artisan cheeses and make thick farmhouse yogurts.
For four generations, Kavanagh's have raised slow-grown lamb and beef on the bracken slopes of the Wicklow Mountains. All animals are reared outdoors with care and given space to thrive.
Perched on the shores of Mulroy Bay, we wild-catch Atlantic salmon and oak-smoke it over 24 hours using traditional methods. From bay to your door in under 48 hours.
From the limestone pavements of the Burren, we cold-press rapeseed oil and infuse it with freshly-grown herbs. Every bottle captures the unique terroir of this extraordinary landscape.
